Some slight differences between the jobs for this where you need to go to a different location to find the first weapon. Unlocks 2 trials as well.
Can farm some of the memories for the ShB relic. Unlike Atma, can be on any job with any weapons. BLU helps out. I had finished mine before they announced Yokai-Watch event....
Can unsync the dungeons. Make sure to have the relic equipped before engaging the final boss. A few dungeons from the Zodiac Braves step can be done during this as well.
Farming ARR FATEs. Isn't much else you can work on at the same time. If Yokai-Watch comes back again, you can do both. I got like half my Atma for all 10 weapons doing all the medal farming.
One hell of a grind IMO.
After you've done your first relic, you can have the Zodiac Brave quests active and some of the books will knock out some of the dungeons you need to do.
Hope you've been holding onto materia the entire time. If a meld fails you only lose the materia and not the Alexandrite. If you got the poetics, you can bang out maps for them fairly fast.
The worst step for HW really. Grind out sand and poetics and dump it into stats.

Like the Animus books, you can get some light from doing the Zodiac brave quests. It's pretty much find a dungeon you can speed run and just spam it for a few hours. Tam-Tara Deepcroft is a good one, so is Aurum Vale as you can skip most of the trash mobs and mow an entire dungeon's worth of mobs down at the same time which is fun.

This will eat Gil and Company Seals very fast if doing all 10. Can do some of Animus, Nexus, and Zeta steps at the same time as well as some of Awoken from HW. Unlike Animus, Nexus, and Zeta, you don't need the relic equipped.

Can grind some light from FATEs while doing FATEs for HW crystals or ShB memories. Its takes like 300, but you can do it, it's what I did with my WAR axe. Can get some light doing daily roulettes if you get HW content, or grinding ShB Memories thru its alliance raids. Otherwise, start up a PF or join one for A9S for 21 runs. I did all of mine before the 5.45 step........
It's another light farm, but you need to spend poetics. Its two dungeons per Mahatma, or one alliance raid. Same deal with Nexus for double dipping.
Can solo unsync these fairly easily. Requires the Warring Triad story to be done as the last three trials are them. Nothing with Thordan oddly enough even though he's a Primal.

It's quite literally the same thing for the entire relic. You mass murder certain enemies to spawn a NM and kill that NM. Rinse, repeat. To gain your elemental levels, do your weekly challenge log for a hefty chunk of EXP. Can pretty much skip the one Pyros step that just involves giving the weapon substats and can also skip the Eurekan Fragment bit if you want as it just adds an elemental bonus which is basically a increase in power only in Eureka. Pretty much the only use for the Elemental Armor sets as well, other then for glamour. Whole thing can be summed up with "easy, peasy, kill me pleasy."

Grinding the HW FATEs is generally faster unless you have a coordinated group in Bozja. BLU makes it really easy for the FATEs. Can grind out your elemental crystals for the start of the HW relic. The Antitower is the fastest dungeon to run for the second bit. Doing daily roulettes will give you 1-2, depending on what you get in the 50/60/70 roulette.
It's just a poetics tome dump after doing all the ARR-EW Manderville quests.

Can do ARR light and Mahatma farm during Sycrus Tower spam and HW light farm during Void Ark spam for the one time you need to that. This is VERY "easy, peasy, kill me pleasy." Can do some leveling in Palace of the Dead if you don't mind the drop rate.
Can do the Timeworn Artifact grind the same time as this is you're doing Deubrum for it or level in HoH.
It's all a tome dump after a one time lengthy grind. Expect a LOT of Roulettes in yoru future when you start these.
